locations.notes: Primary: Haifa and surrounding area. Tel Aviv only if hybrid (not full-time on-site). Fully remote worldwide welcome within UTC+2..UTC+5. On-site outside the Haifa area is NOT acceptable.

ats._comment: Public ATS job boards to scrape. Add company board tokens you target. Unknown/invalid tokens are skipped gracefully. greenhouse: boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/{token}/jobs | lever: api.lever.co/v0/postings/{token}?mode=json | ashby: api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api/job-board/{token}
